---
title: "Deextinction Nightmare Part 2 - Colossal Lies Bibliography"
description: "Bibliography for Episode 369 - Deextinction Nightmare Part 2 - Colossal Lies"
author: "Jack LaRoche"
date: "2026-04-23"
categories: [QAA, Bibliography, Wildlife, Conservation, Science, Tech Bros, Fascism]
---

# Deextinction Nightmare Part 2 - Colossal Lies Bibliography

![](thumbnail.png)

**Regenesis: How Synthetic Biology Will Reinvent Nature and Ourselves**
George M. Church

**How to Build a Dinosaur: Extinction Doesn’t Have to Be Forever**
Jack Horner

**How to Clone a Mammoth: The Science of De-Extinction**
Beth Shapiro

**Happy Birthday Dire Wolf (Official Music Video)**
[Stan Bush](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-XqcqbLBLHo)

**Black-Footed Ferret Friend**
[Colossal Biosciences](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/PmAbyBtfLpc)
